overview.description: The KraneShares Quadratic Interest Rate Volatility and Inflation Hedge ETF (IVOL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of TIPS and long options tied to the U.S. interest rate swap curve. IVOL was launched on May 13, 2019 and is issued by Quadratic.

data.text: Hi! In this week's ETF Wrap, you'll see the spot in markets investors liked in August as ETF flows trended below the historical average in a down month for stocks.
